name: str_replace
title: str_replace
syntax: long str_replace(char s[], char searched[], char replacement[]); // form 1
long str_replace(char s[], long startoffset, char replacement[], long length); // form 2
description: Form 1: Replaces all occurrences of a text in a string with another string.
Form 2: Replaces a part of a string with another string.

parameters.name: startoffset
parameters.description: Offset at which to start replacing characters.

parameters.name: replacement
parameters.description: Text which replaces the original characters.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Maximum number of characters to replace.

return: 1 if successful, 0 if the resulting string would be too long for the buffer s.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
